name: nexudus-content-generator
description: Generate first-draft Nexudus training content from a feature brief — Product Updates, Webinar Briefs, Video Scripts, Training Scripts, and Academy Lessons. Uses a local example library as the primary style reference and pulls live data from the Nexudus CLI for realistic demo steps.
author: Nexudus Academy

access: Nexudus Academy account via nexudus CLI

skills.name: generate-content
skills.description: Generate Nexudus training content (Product Update, Webinar Brief, Video Script, Training Script, Academy Lesson) from pasted feature briefs or release notes

agents.name: content-writer
agents.description: Specialist content writer for Nexudus training materials
